title: DiscordConnector
description: Customizable Plugin that connects Discord and Minecraft
body:
# DiscordConnector
A Minecraft Plugin that connects Discord and Minecraft

Features:
- Chat Bridge
- Console Bridge
- Updating Channel name with player count

Customization:
- Syntax of how messages from the other platform are displayed on Minecraft/Discord
- Syntax of Join Messages
- And more
Most of the features can be disabled

Setup:
- Create a Discord Bot
- Set the Bot token in the config
- Configure Channels like described in the Documentation below.

[![Documentation](https://img.shields.io/badge/Documentation-37a779?style=for-the-badge)](https://nottamion.github.io/DiscordConnector/)

For questions or help please contact me on Discord: tamion
